title: Survival Kit
description: This mod adds survival kits similar to servers, but in a single game or multiplayer
body: ## ⚡ About Survival Kit is a mod that adds survival kits to the game, similar to those that can be found on the servers. You can play either alone or with friends. Currently, there are 11 sets of characters available in the mod. You can also install this mod on your server! ## 🔧 Commands ### New (after version 1.6) 1. `/kit menu` or `/kits` - open kit menu 2. `/kit give ` - give kit 3. `/kit admin` - give admin gem ### Old (before version 1.6) 1. `/KitMenu` - open kit menu 2. `/kitmenu` or `/kits` - open kit menu (version 1.5 and 1.5.1) 3. `/admin` - give admin gem 4. `/= ` - give kit ## 🧨 Hot keys 1. `K` - open kit menu ## 📑 List of kit 1. Set: "Woob and Leather" - Wooden set 2. Set: "Stone Age" - Stone set 3. Set: "Iron Classic" - Iron set 4. Set: "Gold Rush" - Gold set 5. Set: "Diamonds" - A diamond set 6. Set: "Pixel Art Builder" 7. Set: "Art Builder" 8. Set: "Millionaire" 9. Set: "Admin Part" 10. Set: "Divine" 11. Set: "Nether Diamonds?" - Set of netherite 12. Set: "Cave Build" ## 🌐 Supported Languages ![English](https://img.shields.io/badge/-English-06?style=for-the-badge&color=000) ![Русский](https://img.shields.io/badge/-Русский-06?style=for-the-badge&color=000) ## 🎨 Screenshots ## 🎬 Video Video review in Russian from [Пафосный Малыш](https://www.youtube.com/@pafosny-malysh) channel ## 💾 Download [![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/-CurseForge-06?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&color=000)](https://modrinth.com/mod/survival-kit) [![modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/-modrinth-06?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&color=000)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/survival-kit)
